name: libxstring-perl
title: libxstring-perl
summary: module containing isolated string helpers from B
description:
module containing isolated string helpers from B
The extremely lightweight XString module provides the string helpers from
the much larger B module (Perl compiler backend) in an isolated package.
.
Currently the cstring and perlstring helpers are available.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxstring-perl because module containing isolated string helpers from B.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxstring-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxstring-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxstring-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
